title: The Current: Explore the Healing Powers of the Ocean
original_title: The Current: Explore the Healing Powers of the Ocean
overview: The story of individuals from all walks of life that have faced incredible obstacles, found the drive to overcome their disabilities, and have through water sports become real everyday heroes.
